vol_name: Long-term effects of institutional rearing, foster care, and brain activity on memory and executive functioning
vol_description: These data sets are the raw data used in the analysis related to our publication in PNAS. The first dataset is the main SPSS file from which the primary analysis was conducted. The last 4 datasets are for the relation between brain activity (EEG alpha power) and the slopes and intercepts of the CANTAB outcomes from age 8 to 16.

vol_name: Stress sensitization among severely neglected children and protection by social enrichment: Follow-up of a randomized controlled trial
vol_description: SPSS data and syntax used in the primary analysis
